strategy_note: Angle = 'the honest lift.' Differentiator is not the machine (Sofwave is widely available) but i-Beaute's restraint: a real consultation that will tell you Sofwave is NOT right for you. We sell the in-between space — past creams, not ready for surgery — and let zero-downtime + gradual-natural result carry the logic. Tone: editorial, calm, never hype.

hero_angle.promise: A natural lift without surgery or downtime — visible tightening from a single ultrasound session.
hero_angle.headline_gist: Lift the jaw, brow and neck back — no knife, no downtime. Emphasis word: 'lift' / 'naturally'.
hero_angle.sub_gist: Sofwave ultrasound rebuilds collagen deep in the skin; you walk out the same day and results keep improving for ~3 months.
hero_angle.badge_gist: Zero downtime · single ~30-min session (honest framing, not false urgency)

pain.point: Serums and facials used to be enough — now they sit on the surface while the jawline keeps softening.
The mirror shows a heavier jaw, a hooding brow, a looser neck — small slips that read as 'tired' even when you're not.
A surgical facelift feels too drastic, and weeks of downtime simply don't fit around work and family.

problem_points.point: It's not your skincare routine failing you — once laxity sets in, the change is in the deep dermis where creams physically can't reach.
Laxity is structural: collagen and elastin in the mid-dermis thin and loosen with age. Topicals work above that layer, so the slide continues underneath.
You've been offered two extremes — keep buying creams that can't reach it, or have surgery you don't want. The useful middle option rarely gets explained.

story_timeline.point: One ~30-minute session. Targeted ultrasound reaches the mid-dermis; integrated cooling keeps the surface comfortable. You leave the same day — maybe slight redness, nothing to hide.
Early firmness as the skin begins responding — subtle, not a sudden 'new face.'
New collagen matures and the real lift settles in — jaw, brow and neck look tighter and more defined, gradually enough that it reads as 'well-rested,' not 'done.'

how_steps: Consultation first — a trained therapist assesses your skin and the areas in question, and tells you honestly whether Sofwave will actually help.
Targeted ultrasound — energy is delivered to the mid-dermis across the chosen areas (jaw, brow, neck or submental), with integrated cooling for comfort, in about 30 minutes.
Collagen rebuilds — over ~3 months your own new collagen matures and lifts; we review with you and advise on maintenance only if and when it's useful.
proof_strategy: Use ONLY real assets: 'Rated 4.9 ★ · 193 reviews on Fresha' as the headline trust number, plus the three real clinic-wide reviews (Maria W., Kelly B., Ayva). Frame them honestly as overall clinic reviews — about the team, care and professionalism — NOT as Sofwave-specific results. sample_note must state reviews are clinic-wide, verified on Fresha/Bookwell. No invented names, numbers, or before/after claims.

authority: Trained, certified Sofwave practitioners — not a sideline add-on.
Every plan starts with a real assessment; they treat the face as a whole and will say no if Sofwave isn't right for you.
Established Chatswood clinic — The Gallery, Suite 16, 445 Victoria Ave.
authority_angle: Lead with restraint as the credibility signal: 'never a single sale — an honest answer about suitability.' This is the spine of the whole page.

benefits.title: Reaches where creams can't
benefits.body: Ultrasound targets the mid-dermis to rebuild collagen at the layer responsible for laxity.

benefits.title: Zero downtime
benefits.body: Mild redness at most; most people return to their day immediately — no marks to hide.

benefits.title: Natural, gradual result
benefits.body: The lift builds over ~3 months, so it reads as well-rested, not surgically altered.

benefits.title: One session, all skin tones
benefits.body: A single ~30-minute treatment; works independently of melanin, suitable year-round.

offer.price_note: Treatment pricing is tailored to the areas treated and confirmed at consultation. Do NOT invent a price, 'was' value, or discount.
bullets: Targeted Sofwave treatment (jaw, brow, neck or submental)
offer.fine_gist: Consultation complimentary; treatment pricing confirmed at consult. No guarantee stated by clinic — do not invent one.

rows.verdict: Creams=ongoing forever, Sofwave=single ~30-min session, Surgery=procedure + recovery

comparison.framing: Sofwave wins by sitting in the middle — surgical-level depth without surgical cost in time/recovery. Be fair to surgery (it goes furthest for advanced sagging); honesty reinforces the brand.

yes: Noticing early to moderate laxity on the jaw, brow or neck
Want a natural lift, not a dramatic change
Can't fit surgical downtime around work and family
Would rather invest once than keep chasing results with creams
no: Significant, advanced sagging that's genuinely better suited to surgery
Pregnant or with certain medical conditions — we'll tell you honestly at consult

faq.a_gist: A warming sensation with brief moments of heat; integrated cooling keeps the surface comfortable and the therapist adjusts to you.
Yes — mild redness or slight puffiness at most, no marks to hide; most people return to their day immediately.
Some firmness in the first weeks; the real result builds as new collagen matures over ~3 months after a single session.
New-collagen results are long-lasting, though skin keeps ageing — many choose a maintenance session later. Honest, personalised view at consult.

faq.q: Is it safe for my skin tone?
faq.a_gist: Yes — Sofwave's ultrasound works independently of melanin, suitable for all skin tones, year-round.

faq.q: How do I start, and what does it cost?
faq.a_gist: With a complimentary consultation where we assess suitability and recommend Sofwave only if it's genuinely right; pricing is tailored to the areas treated and confirmed there. Book on Fresha.

final_angle.headline_gist: If the creams have stopped working but surgery feels too far — this is the honest middle. Start with a free consultation.
final_angle.body_gist: Reassure: no pressure, real assessment, and a straight answer about whether Sofwave suits you.

info.body: The Gallery, Suite 16 · 445 Victoria Ave, Chatswood NSW 2067

compliance_notes: Cosmetic/medical advertising: avoid guarantee/outcome promises. Hedge results ('visibly', '~3 months', 'many', 'most people') — never 'will'.
No before/after claims tied to named individuals; reviews are clinic-wide, not Sofwave-specific.
No invented price, discount, urgency, or guarantee. Pricing = consultation-based.
TGA & FDA cleared is a factual claim from intake.facts — safe to state as 'cleared,' not 'approved-to-cure.'
